architecture.summary: Scope: delete claude-cli.ts, remove native install from add.ts. gitUrl kept if used beyond native install. cleanPluginCache unconditional.

ui-ux.summary: Silent removal of native install prompts. No migration messaging.

edge-cases.summary: No stale plugin migration. Remove misleading --plugin-dir hint.

integrations.summary: No cross-repo impact. specweave plugin-copier.ts unchanged.

security.summary: No security implications - removing code only.

performance.summary: This is a code removal refactor — removing ~630 lines of native plugin install code. Performance improves: no subprocess calls to claude CLI during install, no marketplace registration overhead. File-copy is faster and more reliable.
